channel.title: Linear-Regression on The Probability Engine
channel.description: Recent content in Linear-Regression on The Probability Engine

item.title: Statistical Learning: Foundations, Bias-Variance and the Art of Estimation
item.description: A rigorous walkthrough of ISLP Chapter 2 fundamentals — from the formal definition of f(X) to the bias-variance decomposition, Bayes classifiers, and KNN — with Python code, real datasets, and connections to epistemology and learning theory.
